---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Zhenning Zhang — Machine Learning Engineer"
description-meta: "Machine Learning Engineer specializing in deep learning for drug discovery and medical imaging. Nearly seven years at AstraZeneca R&D IT."
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <link rel="canonical" href="https://zhenningzhang.net">
---

::: {.hero-block}
<div class="hero-name">Zhenning Zhang</div>
<div class="hero-role">Machine Learning Engineer · Medical AI</div>

<p class="hero-lede">
I build deep learning systems for drug discovery and medical imaging.
Nearly seven years at AstraZeneca R&D IT, with peer-reviewed work in
<em>Patterns</em> and four AACR poster presentations.
M.S. Bioinformatics, University of Michigan.
</p>

<p>
[Selected work](#selected-work) &nbsp; · &nbsp;
[Publications](publications.qmd) &nbsp; · &nbsp;
[CV (PDF)](assets/zhenning_zhang_resume.pdf) &nbsp; · &nbsp;
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhenning-zhang)
</p>
:::

::: {.section-marker}
<span class="section-num">§ 01</span>

## Recent
:::

::: {.work-entry}
<div class="work-meta">April 2026 · AACR Annual Meeting</div>
### Automatic contrast phase classification of polyphasic CT scans
Poster presentation at the AACR Annual Meeting 2026 (San Diego). Co-authored work on
identifying contrast phase from CT volumes — a prerequisite for downstream tumor
segmentation pipelines that depend on consistent imaging protocol.
<div class="work-links">
[Abstract — Cancer Research 86, Suppl. 7, 2777](https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/86/7_Supplement/2777/778083/Abstract-2777-Automatic-contrast-phase){.external}
</div>
:::

::: {.section-marker}
<span class="section-num">§ 02</span>

## Selected work {#selected-work}
:::

::: {.work-entry}
<div class="work-meta">2025 – Present · AstraZeneca</div>
### Multimodal IC50 prediction
PyTorch models fusing cell painting microscopy with SMILES chemical
representations for compound activity prediction. Deployed across compound
libraries totaling 39K compounds; jointly learned image-and-structure embeddings
inform downstream phenotype-to-target reasoning.
<div class="work-links">
[Read more →](projects/ic50-multimodal.qmd)
</div>
:::

::: {.work-entry}
<div class="work-meta">2025 – Present · AstraZeneca</div>
### Biomedical imaging data platform
Unified ingestion and preprocessing platform for biomedical imaging at scale —
now the team's standard data layer. Sixteen multi-center datasets, 150K CT
volumes, automated mapping of thousands of annotation masks across DICOM and
NIfTI standards.
<div class="work-links">
[Read more →](projects/data-ingestion-platform.qmd)
</div>
:::

::: {.work-entry}
<div class="work-meta">2023 – Present · AstraZeneca</div>
### Interactive 3D segmentation toolset
Transformer-backed segmentation tool for 3D volumetric data with text-guided
prompts. Halved annotation time and deployed to twelve internal users across R&D.
Companion paper as poster at AACR 2024.
<div class="work-links">
[Read more →](projects/segmentation-toolkit.qmd) ·
[Abstract — AACR 2024](https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/84/6_Supplement/887/741446){.external}
</div>
:::

::: {.work-entry}
<div class="work-meta">2021 – 2022 · AstraZeneca</div>
### Graph-based analysis of multiplex immunofluorescence
Graph Neural Networks over multi-channel images, capturing spatial cell-cell
relationships in multiplex IF for downstream phenotype classification.
Preprint on bioRxiv; abstracts at SITC and AACR.
<div class="work-links">
[Read more →](projects/multiplex-if-gnn.qmd) ·
[Preprint — bioRxiv](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2021.06.09.447654v1){.external}
</div>
:::

::: {.work-entry}
<div class="work-meta">2026 · Personal</div>
### Multi-agent stock analysis pipeline
Three-agent system (analyst → challenger → synthesizer) running on locally
hosted Gemma via Ollama, with a Streamlit dashboard. Designed to surface
disagreement and adversarial critique before final synthesis.
<div class="work-links">
[Read more →](projects/multi-agent-stock.qmd) ·
[Live demo (Hugging Face Spaces) →](https://huggingface.co/spaces){.external}
</div>
:::

::: {.section-marker}
<span class="section-num">§ 03</span>

## Career — AstraZeneca, 2019 – present
:::

::: {.career-threads}
**Drug Discovery ML** — [IC50 multimodal](projects/ic50-multimodal.qmd) · [GNN multiplex IF](projects/multiplex-if-gnn.qmd)

**Medical Imaging & Segmentation** — [interactive 3D segmentation](projects/segmentation-toolkit.qmd) · [contrast phase classification](projects/aacr-2026-contrast-classification.qmd) · patch-based unsupervised analysis · microcalcification detection

**Tooling & Infrastructure** — [biomedical imaging data platform](projects/data-ingestion-platform.qmd) · [embedding visualization toolkit](projects/embedding-visualization.qmd) · DICOM/NIfTI annotation pipelines
:::

Before AZ: Software Engineer at Ann Arbor Algorithms (2018 – 2019) —
chest vessel segmentation, 3D tumor segmentation, lung cancer prediction,
ECG abnormality detection. [Full project list →](projects.qmd)

::: {.section-marker}
<span class="section-num">§ 04</span>

## More
:::

For the full list of professional work, personal projects, and writing, see
[all work](projects.qmd) or the [publications page](publications.qmd).

For collaboration, hiring, or conversations: reach me on
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhenning-zhang)
or via the contact details on my [CV](assets/zhenning_zhang_resume.pdf).
